RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT DAVID BAHAR'S Motion To Strike Request For Exemplary Damages From Plaintiff's First Amended Complaint is Granted. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Court Reporter: Lavena Ward, CSR #7077 =302/HEK

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Request For Exemplary Damages From Complaint;
Off Calendar Nov-09-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as modified.
